title: You NEED To Know This About The Youtube Algorithm

transcript.text: The algorithm isn't doing what you think it's doing. What's actually happening is costing you views, subscribers, and growth every single day. Let's start with the basics. The YouTube algorithm is not one thing. It's a collection of systems working together, each one with one job. Find the right video for the right person at the right moment. [music] Here's what most beginners get wrong. They think the algorithm promotes their video to an audience. It doesn't. Before the YouTube algorithm can find the right person for your video, it needs to understand what your video is actually about. Read your title, your description, your chapters. It transcribes your audio. It watches who clicked, who stayed, who left. All of that becomes one signal that answers one question. Who is this video for? And this is why some of the fastest growing channels on YouTube are built on radical simplicity.
